Here is a simple way to visualize the intervals array:

Next, we initialize a variable called prevEnd to the endi of the first interval, or intervals[0][1], and a variable called count to 0.

let prevEnd = intervals[0][1]
let count = 0

Here is what that looks like:

For loops typically begin at i=0, but notice our for loop begins at i=1.

 for (let i=1; i<intervals.length; i++) {
...
}

This is because we've already used the first element of the intervals array, which represents i=0, to set the variable prevEnd = intervals[0][1]. In our case, prevEnd is initialized at 2.

So starting at i=1, every iteration of the for loop compares the values between intervals[i][0] and prevEnd to determine which code in the if/else statement to execute. Note that the value of prevEnd will get updated each iteration.

If intervals[i][0] is greater than or equal to prevEnd, it means that the interval does not overlap with the previous interval and prevEnd is updated to the endi of the current interval, or intervals[i][1].

if (intervals[i][0] >= prevEnd) {
  prevEnd = intervals[i][1]
...

Else, if intervals[i][0] is less than prevEnd, it means that the interval overlaps with the previous interval. So, the variable count is incremented by one and prevEnd is updated to the minimum value between intervals[i][1] and prevEnd.

...
else
  count++
  prevEnd = Math.min(intervals[i][1], prevEnd)
}

Let's walk through the for loop and see how the if/else statement gets applied at each iteration.

In the first iteration, when i=1, we can see that intervals[i][0] <= prevEnd.

According to the if/else statement, we increment the count by 1 and set prevEnd to the smaller value between intervals[i][1] and prevEnd. In this case intervals[1][1]=3 and prevEnd=2, so prevEnd remains the same.

In the next iteration when i=2, prevEnd = intervals[i][0].

According to the if/else statement, we set prevEnd to intervals[i][1]. In this case intervals[2][1]=3, so prevEnd updates its value to 3.

In the last iteration when i=3, prevEnd = intervals[i][0] once again.

Since, there are no more iterations, we exit the for loop and return our count, which is 1.

A visual review of our process shows that removing the second element of the array makes the rest of the array non-overlapping.

The time complexity is O(nlog n), where n is the number of intervals in the input array. This is because the code first sorts the input array, which takes O(nlog n) time, and then iterates through the array once, performing constant-time operations on each element.

The space complexity is O(1), which means that the amount of memory used by the code is constant, regardless of the size of the input. This is because the code only uses a few constant-size variables to store information, and does not create any new arrays or objects.

The world of software development is openly unpredictable and dynamic. If you have at least a few years of experience in this industry, it is likely that you are aware of the influx of changes that influence the decisions made by entrepreneurs and developers.

Now, developers and businesses acknowledge JavaScript programming as the best option for front-end, back-end, and dynamic, interactive user experiences. What Are The Most Common Frameworks That JavaScript Will Accommodate In The Future?

With Vue.js, PWAs and SPAs can be made efficiently and rapidly. This framework is user-friendly, provides a wide range of capabilities, and has thorough documentation.

Conclusion

Despite the existence of other widely used programming languages, like C++, C#, etc., Python has retained its popularity. Thus, we covered some Python trends for the future in this article.

在本文中，您将了解 javaScript 中的 IIFE。
所有初学者级别的开发人员都应该至少了解有关 IIFE 的这些知识。

顾名思义，它是一个定义后立即调用的函数，不需要显式调用函数。

定义 IIFE 的语法如下：

在这个例子中，我们定义了一个匿名函数，将其括在括号中使其成为一个表达式，然后在末尾使用 () 立即调用它。

使用 IIFE 有什么好处。

使用 IIFE 的主要好处是它有助于避免变量和函数污染全局命名空间。 通过将代码包装在 IIFE 中，我们创建了一个私有作用域，其中在其中声明的变量和函数无法在其外部访问。 这对于防止与全局范围内定义的其他变量和函数发生命名冲突很有用。

在这个例子中，我们正在创建一个 IIFE 函数。 在这里面我们创建了一个计数变量和增量函数。 此递增函数递增计数器的值。

但是如果我们尝试在函数之外打印会发生什么。
它得到一个 ReferenceError 因为 IIFE 不在全球范围内保存数据。 这是他私有范围内的安全数据，所以我们不能在这个函数之外使用。

In this article you will learn about the IIFE in javaScript.
All beginners level developers should know atleast this knowledge about the IIFE.

IIFE, or Immediately Invoked Function Expression, is a self-executing anonymous function in JavaScript. As the name suggests, it is a function that is invoked immediately after it is defined, without the need for an explicit function call.

The syntax for defining an IIFE is as follows:

In this example, we define an anonymous function, wrap it in parentheses to make it an expression, and then immediately invoke it using the () at the end.

What is the Benefits using IIFE.

The primary benefit of using IIFE is that it helps to avoid polluting the global namespace with variables and functions. By wrapping code inside an IIFE, we create a private scope where variables and functions declared inside it are not accessible outside of it. This is useful for preventing naming collisions with other variables and functions defined in the global scope.

In this example we are creating a IIFE function. Inside this we are created a count variable and increament function. This increament function increments the value of counter.
After this we are calling a increament function and then print the counter value and what's the output of this yes 😁 you are right it's 1.

But what happened if we try to print outside of the function.
It's getting a ReferenceError because IIFE not saves data globally. It's safe data inside his private scope so we can't use outside of this function.

I hope you understand what is IIFE and Why this it is used.

Items.Title: 您必须知道的 2023 年金融科技十大趋势 | Top 10 Fintech Trends for 2023 You Must Know
Items.Description:
维普拉夫·辛格

发表于 4 月 17 日

没有哪个行业没有受到数字革命的影响，即使是金融公司。 随着技术的出现，金融业已发生了翻天覆地的变化。 与技术的结合，金融部门现在是吸引技术用户的中心。

据估计，到 2023 年，金融科技软件解决方案业务预计将达到近 1740 亿美元（来源：福布斯）。 因此，一些金融科技开发公司正在努力提供当前流行的解决方案。 从 DeFi 到嵌入式银行，所有这些趋势现在正在协同重塑今年的金融科技行业。

你跟上这些趋势了吗？ 即使没有，现在你会的。 在本文中，您将了解 2023 年金融科技十大趋势。

人工智能和机器学习

无需介绍人工智能是什么以及它如何利用企业。 根据世界银行的统计，这也是 12 亿人能够获得金融服务的原因之一。 在谈论机器学习时，顾名思义，它通过识别模式从人类行为和数据中学习。 通过结合使用这两种技术，金融科技企业可以实现流程自动化和检测欺诈，同时帮助您更好、更准确地洞察客户行为。

嵌入式金融

嵌入式金融是金融科技行业的一项激动人心的发展。 随着嵌入式金融等技术的进步，金融科技公司能够提升他们的用户体验。 它使用户能够使用同一平台从文书工作中解脱出来并获得信贷服务。

它还可以帮助用户在首次购买时注册一次付款详细信息，从而节省用户的时间。 信息会在用户预先许可的情况下自动保存，并且使用预先注册的付款详细信息可以顺利进行购买。
根据金融专家的说法，嵌入式金融不会只是一个短暂的趋势，而是到 2030 年将达到 30 亿美元的市场。通过这样的预测，我们可以理解它在不久的将来对金融科技业务的好处。

谈到刚刚过去的 2022 年，DeFi 市场在 2022 年估计约为 136.1 亿美元（来源 Mininventory），而随着 2023 年刚刚开始，市场已经达到 1.58 亿美元（商业研究公司）的数字，并且有望增长复合年增长率为 46.0%。

这个数字显示了市场广阔而清晰的潜力。 但它对您的用户有何好处？ 所以，答案是，它有助于点对点快速、简单、安全和免费的交易。 用户将能够获得金融产品和服务，而无需依赖那些遗留和传统的金融机构。

霓虹灯银行

这些银行是未来银行服务的绝对定义。 进一步简化概念，这些虚拟银行的物理存在为零。 由于投资最少和零错误范围等所有充分理由，他们变得非常出名。

它允许用户通过不浪费时间去银行访问服务来节省时间，还使用户能够随时随地访问银行。 这一趋势的成功可以衡量为物理分支机构减少 36%。
谈到统计数据，预计到 2025 年，neonbanks 将在 2025 年底达到 3910 万，比 2021 年的统计数据多出约 2000 万（来源 Statista）。

以下是 neonbansks 的一些承诺 • 顶级质量自动化 • 24/7 全天候服务 • 国际支付 • 点对点转账 • 交易费用低的免费卡 • 快速响应 • 购买和兑换加密货币 • 成本管理

简而言之，我们可以说它完全是一种将所有传统用户牢记在心的 Z 世代银行服务。

开放银行

开放银行是一种金融技术，通过使用户能够安全地与第三方交换财务信息，使用户能够更好地控制和自由地管理自己的财务。 客户受益于它的便利性，而公司则可以利用它拓展新市场、开发尖端商品和服务，并通过数据交换提高生产力。

对于希望利用消费者数据潜力的银行、支付提供商和其他金融科技公司而言，开放式银行业务为此提供了广泛的机会。 使用开放式银行业务的客户可以更好地控制其财务数据的存储位置，并可以在不同业务之间顺利移动这些数据，或根据需要向第三方提供商提供访问权限。

物联网

它使您的银行功能更加安全、有效和方便。 它允许您的物理设备连接到互联网并收集数据以在没有任何人为干预的情况下进行分析和操作。

为了包含安全措施，银行可以使用嵌入在产品中的传感器来监控用户活动，并通过根据用户的行为或预设偏好自动响应来节省时间。 它将确保银行业务免受欺诈。
除了与技术同行外，您还可以为语音识别腾出空间。 它几乎可以消除黑客攻击的机会，使登录更加简单，并加强身份验证过程。

先买后付

你还记得上次在哪里看到这句话吗？ 可能是一些流行的电子商务网站。 我们非常确定它正在重塑金融科技行业的阶段。 即使是顶级的金融科技软件开发公司也被金融科技开发人员的需求所淹没，他们适合为其业务开发如此重要的金融科技软件。

有了这个金融科技软件解决方案，有时零利息有时利率低的轻松每月分期付款可以维持生计。 随着这种趋势，用户能够很好地控制财务决策。

无密码认证

回顾过去几年，黑客和网络钓鱼等恶意活动是金融机构和用户最可怕的威胁。 那么哪个金融科技软件解决方案改变了这种情况？

勒索攻击、网络钓鱼和黑客攻击在 2021 年第一季度增加了 25%，每个人都不安全。 然后，为了解决这些问题，金融科技开发人员提出了无密码身份验证的解决方案。 这是一个需要探索的广阔领域，因为它灌输了语音合作伙伴安全性、生物识别和 OTP。
与传统的用户名和密码打孔不同，password less 不显示任何内容。 它会向您发送一个用于一次性密码的验证码，并且可以在有限的时间段内使用一次。 另一个无密码身份验证处理您的指纹。 这也称为生物识别。 这个概念早在 2015 年就存在了。

最后但并非最不重要的身份验证是语音命令。 语音认证还在适配中，但现在在大部分地方已经很普遍了。

这些无需密码的身份验证使您的银行功能和用户体验既安全又可靠。

机器人顾问

财务问题是真正敏感的方面，因为它们涉及辛苦赚来的钱。 即使在日常生活中，我们也会考虑一些建议，然后再做出最轻微的决定。 当涉及金融投资时，建议非常重要。
想象一下，如果您通过分析市场数据获得经过充分评估的投资建议，会怎样？ 是的，你可以继续微笑，因为这不仅仅是一种想象的趋势，而是一种持续的趋势。 它被称为机器人顾问。 在人工智能和机器学习的帮助下，您可以获得经过充分分析的财务决策建议。

尽管这个词可能会让您感到惊讶，但通过不成为银行家来成为银行家是最新鲜的想法之一。 目瞪口呆？ 等等，我们将以更简单的方式向您解释。 银行即服务是一种处理白标银行的趋势。

在集成数字银行的帮助下，您无需成为一家成熟的银行即可提供商品金融和银行服务。 它是通过开放式银行方法提供最佳用户体验的最具成本效益和最安全的模式。

它还建议银行和金融机构应采用这些模块化和面向服务的架构来打造独特的数字服务。

这种趋势无疑正在加速金融业的发展。

您如何匹配金融科技行业的这些趋势？
这很容易！ 您可以从 Zenesys 等顶级金融软件开发公司聘请金融科技开发人员。 它拥有顶级认证和经验丰富的金融科技开发商，在行业中屹立不倒超过 12 年。

凭借他们创新的解决问题的方法，他们能够为 200 多个客户带来微笑。 这些公司的开发人员拥有下一代技术，并了解最新趋势，以便他们可以为您提供最好的帮助。

紧跟最新趋势至关重要，因为它可以帮助您领先竞争对手一步。 通过使用未来主义的方法解决他们的问题，您可以有效地提供最佳的用户体验。 为了实现所有这些目标，Zenesys 将始终为您提供帮助。 从金融科技移动应用程序开发到定制软件开发，Zenesys 应有尽有。

结论

金融科技行业像干燥森林中的火焰一样成长。 这些趋势只是为它增加更多火力的燃料。 变化是自然规律。 有些趋势会在未来出现，有些也可能会改变。

顶级财务软件开发公司将帮助您跟上这些趋势并不时提升您的增长。 因此，让节拍与不断变化的趋势相匹配至关重要，让专家陪伴在您身边也同样重要。

原文:

Viplav Singh

Posted on Apr 17

No sector has remained untouched with the digital revolution, not even the finance company. With the emergence of technology, the finance sector has never been the same. An amalgamation with technology, finance sector is now center of attraction for users, who are trundled to technology.

It is estimated that by 2023 the FinTech Software solution business is estimated to reach almost $174 billion (source: Forbes). Hence, several fintech development companies are striving to deliver solutions that are trending currently. From DeFi to embedded banking, all these trends are now collaborating to reshape the fintech industry this year.

Are you keeping up with these trends? Even if not, now you will. In this write-up you will be induced to top 10 fintech trends of 2023.

Top 10 Fintech Trends that Will be Prevalent in the Year 2023

Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

Artificial intelligence needs no introduction of what it is and how it is leveraging businesses. This is one of the reasons that according to the statistics of the World Bank 1.2 billion people are able to access finance services. AI has efficiency to perceive environment and take an action that push the maximum chances of success.
While talking about Machine Learning, as the name suggests it learns from human behavior and data by identifying the pattern. By leveraging both the technologies together fintech business can automate processes and detect fraud while assisting you with much better and more accurate insights into customer behavior.

Embedded Finance

Embedded finance is one exciting development in the FinTech industry. With technological advancement like embedded finance, fintech companies are able to enhance their user-experience. It has enables the users to get relief from paperwork and access credit services using the same platform.

It also saves your user’s time by helping them to register their payment details for once during their first purchase. The information gets automatically saved with user’s pretermission and the purchases are smooth with pre-registered payment details.
According to financial experts, embedded finance will not be just a passing trend but will the market of $3 billion by 2030. With such a prediction we can understand how beneficial it will be for fintech biz in the near future.

DeFi (Decentralized Finance)

Defi or decentralized finances is one of the most talked about trends in the fintech market. DeFi is all about accepting the upcoming modernization of inducing to the novel investment patterns of blockchain products, cryptocurrency, decentralized finance and foreign currency investments.

Talking about just passed year 2022 the DeFi market was estimated about $ 13.61 billion in 2022 (source Mininventory) and as the year 2023 has just started, the market has already touched the numeric of $158 million (Business Research Company) and is expected to grow at the CAGR of 46.0%.

This numerical displays the potential of the market wide and clear. But how is it beneficial for your users? So, the answer to that is, it helps in peer-to-peer quick, easy, safe and free transactions. Users will be able to have access to financial products and services without depending upon those legacy and traditional finance institutions.

Neonbanking

These are the banks that are the absolute definition of futuristic banking services. Simplifying the concept further, these are virtual banks that have zero physical existence. They are becoming insanely famous for all good reasons like minimal investment, and zero error scope.

It allows users to save their time by not wasting it in traveling to bank to accees the services, also it enables the users to access the bank anytime anywhere. The success of this trend can be measured as 36% reduction of physical branches.
Talking about stats, it is predicted that in the year 2025, neonbanks will reach 39.1 million by the end of 2025 and that is around 20 million more than the stats count of year 2021 (source Statista).

Here are some promises of neonbansks • Top Quality Automation • Service 24/7 • Internation Payments • Peer-to-peer Transfer • Free cards with low transaction fee • Quick Responsive • Buy & Exchange Cryptocurrency • Cost Management

• Real-time Analytics

In short, we can say it is completely a Gen Z banking services keeping all those users who are traditional in mind.

Open Banking

Open banking is a financial technology that allows users better control and freedom over their finances by enabling them to safely exchange their financial information with third parties. Customers benefit from its convenience, while companies can use it to expand into new markets, develop cutting-edge goods and services, and boost productivity through data interchange.

For banks, payment providers, and other fintech companies want to make use of the potential of consumer data, open banking opens a wide range of opportunities regarding this. Customers that use open banking have more control over where their financial data is stored and can smoothly move it between various businesses or give third-party providers access to it as needed.

IoT

It makes your banking function much secure, effective and convenient. It allows your physical devices connected with the internet and collects the data to analyze and act without any human intervention.

To enclose the security measures, banks can use sensors embedded on the products to monitor user activity and save time by automating responses based on their behavior or preset preferences. It will secure the bank operations from fraud.
Apart from this walking with technology, you can also make room for voice recognition. It will almost nullify the chances of hacking, will make login more simplified and will strengthen the authentication process.

Buy Now Pay Later

Can you recall where you saw this phrase written the last time? May be some popular ecommerce website. We are so sure that it is recrafting the phase of fintech industry. Buy Now Pay Later has strengthened the fintech industry has it empowered the users to own their requirements and pay in small and easy chunks.
The popularity of the BNPL is luring so much attention that by 2023 end, this trend and the big names of fintech industries are about to collaborate. Even the top fintech software development company are being flooded with the demands of fintech developers who are apt for such crucial fintech software development for their business.

With this fintech software solution, easy monthly installment with sometimes zero interets and sometimes with a low interest rate are making ends meet. With this trend the user is able to have good control over financial decisions.

Password less Authentication

Turing back a few pages of past years, malicious activities like hacking and phishing were the scareiest threats for both the financial institutions as well as the users. So which FinTech Software Solution has changed the scenario?

Ransome attacks, phishing and hacking were seen to be increased in the first quarters of 2021 by 25% and everyone was insecure. Then to tackle the issues fintech developers came up with the solution of password less authentication. This is a wide field to explore as it inculcates voice partner security, biometric and OTP.
Instead of traditional username and password punching, password less doesn’t display anything. It sends you an authentication code that is for One Time Password and can be used in a limited time period for once. Another password less authentication deals with your fingerprints. This is also known as biometrics. This concept is as old as 2015.

The last but not the least authentication is voice command. Voice authentication is still in process of adaptation but is now common in most of the places.

These passwords less authentication makes your banking functionalities and user experience both safe and secure.

Robo Adviser

Financial matters are real sensitive aspects, as they involve hard-earned money. Even in regular life we consider several advices before putting a step forward with slightest of decisions. And when it is about financial investments, advice matters a lot.
Imagine if you get well evaluated advice for your investment by analyzing market data? Yes, you can keep on smiling further because it is not just a trend to imagine but an on-going trend. It is known as Robo Advisor. With the help of AI and Machine Learning, you can get well analyzed advice for your financial decision.

The evaluation of robo advisor market in year 2022 was around $5.22 billion and it is expected to reach around $41.83 billion by the year 2023 at the compound annual growth rate of 29.7%. • Benefits of Robo Advisor • On-Point Financial Data Analytics • Decision Making with Latest Trend within no time

• Get the perfect financial investment advice

BAAS (Banking as A Service)

Though this term might amaze you, it is one of the freshest ideas to be a banker by not being a banker. Flabbergasted? Wait, we will explain it to you in a much simpler way. Banking as a service is a trend that deal with white label banking.

With the help of integrating digital banking, you can provide financial and bank services with commodities without being a full-fledged bank. It is cost-effective and safest mode of providing the best user-experience with open banking approaches.

It is also advices that banks and financial institutions should adopt these modular and service-oriented architectures to craft unique digital services.

This trend is definitely accelerating the growth of the financial sector.

How can you match these trends of the Fintech Industry?
It's very easy! You can Hire fintech developer from the top financial software development companies like Zenesys. It has been in the industry standing rock stand for 12+ years with top certified and experienced fintech developers.

With their innovative problem-solving approach, they are able to bring smiles to 200+ clients. The developers of such companies are decked with next-gen technologies and are updated with the latest trends ao that they can assist you with the best.

Following the latest trend is essential because it helps you to be a step ahead of your competitors. You can efficiently be able to provide the best user-experience by solving their issues with a futuristic approach. And to achieve all these objectives Zenesys will help you always. From Fintech Mobile App Development to custom software development Zenesys has all in the bag.

Conclusion

The Fintech industry is growing like the fire of dry forest. These trends are just fuel that adds more fire to it. The year 2023 is marked as the peak of growth of Fintech industry and the growth is expected to continue even in the future. Change is the law of nature. Some trends will be present in future and some might change too.

Top financial software development companies will help you to keep up with these trends and escalate your growth from time to time. Hence it is essential to match the beat with the changing trends and equally essential to have experts by your side.

Items.Title: 未来的领导力 | Future Leadership
Items.Description:
在过去的 16 个月中，我们在全球范围内采访了 140 多位首席执行官，其中包括来自奥迪、万事达卡、联合利华、百思买、甲骨文、凯撒、Verizon 和许多其他著名公司的代表。 这些访谈旨在研究最新一本书《未来的领导者》，该书深入探讨了 2030 年及以后有效领导所需的素质。 向这些 CEO 提出的关键问题之一涉及将塑造未来领导力的最重要趋势。 根据他们的回答，确定了六个关键趋势，这些趋势将对未来十年及以后的未来领导者产生重大影响。 趋势是变革的步伐、人工智能与技术、全球化、新的人才格局、目的与意义、道德与伦理。 所有这些趋势都让领导者能够管理他们应对未来的能力，而且没有一个是不可避免的。 领导者“无所不知”的日子被计算在内，因为这种演变的速度如此之快，以至于我们无法一直赶上。 作为领导者，现在是我们在解决他人行为之前优先了解自己的时候了。 行为改变并不容易，但它是帮助领导者解锁和适应我们可以共同建设的未来的重要钥匙。

原文:


During the last 16 months, interviews with more than 140 CEOs were conducted globally, including representatives from Audi, MasterCard, Unilever, Best Buy, Oracle, Kaiser, Verizon, and many other notable companies. These interviews aimed to research the latest book, “The Future Leader,” which delves into the qualities required for effective leadership in 2030 and beyond. One of the critical questions posed to these CEOs concerned the most significant trends that will shape the future of leadership. Based on their responses, six key trends have been identified that will significantly impact future leaders for the next decade and beyond. The trends are the Pace of Change, Ai & Tech, Globalisation, New Talent Landscape, Purpose & Meaning, Morality & Ethics. All these trends prepare leaders to manage their capability to cope with the future, and none of them is inevitable. The days when the leader “knew it all” are counted since this evolution drives at such a pace that we won’t be able to catch up all the time. As a Leader, it’s high time we prioritise knowing ourselves before addressing others’ behaviours. Behavioural change isn’t easy, but it is an important key that helps leaders unlock and adapt to the future we can build together.

Sara McCombs (they/them) - Jul 18 '20
